basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Content Developer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) has officially announced the Content Developer Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. CMD/AB/01/2026 at the official CMD Kerala website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 40 years and hold a Degree in any subject with a Diploma in Journalism/Public Relations/Mass Communication OR a recognized Degree in Journalism/Public Relations/Mass Communication along with working knowledge of computers, especially MS Office, can now submit their online applications up to 24-06-2026. Direct links

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in any subject with Diploma in Journalism/Public Relations/Mass Communication OR A recognized Degree in Journalism/Public Relations/ Mass Communication. Working knowledge in Computers especially in MS Office.
qualification.details: Degree in any subject with Diploma in Journalism/Public Relations/Mass Communication OR A recognized Degree in Journalism/Public Relations/ Mass Communication. Working knowledge in Computers especially in MS Office.

selection_process: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Kerala Content Developer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the CMD Kerala Content Developer recruitment is 24th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Content Developer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in any subject with a Diploma in Journalism/Public Relations/Mass Communication, or a recognized Degree in Journalism/Public Relations/Mass Communication. Working knowledge of computers, especially MS Office, is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Content Developer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Content Developer post is 40 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Content Developer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Content Developer post will receive a salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Content Developer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Content Developer in the Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala).

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CMD Kerala Content Developer recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Content Developer position is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Application Screening, Criteria-based Screening, Written Test, Group Discussion, Skill Test/Proficiency Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
